title: Prompt Template Definition
description: Schema for built-in prompt template definition files used by PromptBabbler.

$schema.description: Reference to the JSON Schema file for validation.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the prompt template schema this file conforms to.

id.description: Unique identifier for the built-in template.

description.description: Brief description of what the template does.

systemPrompt.description: The system prompt text used by the template.
